sections.paragraph:
Original: תּפף

Transliteration: tâphaph

Phonetic: taw-faf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to play or sound the timbrel, beat, play upon, drum (on a timbrel or other object)
    1. (Qal) playing (participle)
    2. (Poel) beating (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2536

Part(s) of speech: Verb
